name: study-graph-assistant
description: Local-first study graph assistant for CS/AI students: modules, topic graph, daily schedule optimizer

scripts.ingest:dry-run: node -e "const i=require('./src/main/ingest');const r=i.scanRoot(process.argv[1]||process.env.HOME+'/Desktop/year_three');for(const m of r.modules)console.log(m.code.padEnd(10),m.files.length+' files,',m.topicSuggestions.length+' topic suggestions');console.log('strategy:',r.strategyPath)"
